package rulefixtures

// scenario for allocation_churn_in_loop: Obvious make, new, or buffer-construction calls inside loops.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule437NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario437Negative(records []Rule437NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
